meta.name: coverage-orphan-sub
meta.goal: Test coverage failure when a defined sub-requirement is not referenced by any task

context.confirmed_goal: Build a CLI with full spec derivation chain

decisions.decision: Use Node.js for the CLI runtime
decisions.rationale: Team has Node.js expertise and existing tooling

requirements.behavior: CLI initializes a spec from the project goal using D1 runtime

sub.behavior: A valid spec.json is created when spec init is run with a goal in a new project directory
An error is returned and no overwrite occurs when spec init is run again in a directory where spec.json already exists
Validation passes with exit code 0 when spec validate is run on a valid spec.json
Status shows zero tasks when spec status is run on a spec with no tasks

requirements.behavior: CLI stores spec data as JSON files per decision D2

sub.behavior: A valid JSON file exists at the given path when the output path is inspected after spec init succeeds
A descriptive error is printed when an invalid JSON file is passed to spec validate
The resulting file is still valid JSON when spec merge is run on a spec.json merged with a JSON fragment
